title: NZ Information Sharing Standard — Purpose and Scope
description: New Zealand government standard (effective 1 July 2025) requiring public service agencies to implement controls and legally binding agreements when sharing personal information with non-government third parties delivering public services. Covers risk assessment, due diligence, agreement templates, and compliance with Privacy Act requirements.

source.page_title: Purpose and scope | NZ Digital government

change_log.summary: Initial draft created from NZ Government Digital guidance on information sharing standard for third-party data sharing with public service agencies.
